---
title: "Graph analytics of stock market"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(duckdb)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidyquant)

conn <- dbConnect(duckdb(), "data/sp500_prices_2026-04-01.duckdb")
dbGetQuery(conn, "FROM prices LIMIT 3")
# dbGetQuery(conn, "select count(*) from prices;")
```

```{r}
df_returns <- tbl(conn, "prices") |>
  as_tibble() |>
  group_by(symbol) |>
  tq_transmute(
    select = adjusted,
    mutate_fun = periodReturn,
    period = "daily",
    type = "log",
    leading = FALSE
  ) |>
  drop_na()

df_returns |> slice_head(n = 2)
```
